title: KSI Vs. Tommy Fury & Logan Paul Vs. Dillon Danis
overview: KSI takes on Tommy Fury in a monumental crossover boxing battle. Logan Paul fights in the other half of the double main event taking on Dillon Danis at the AO Arena in Manchester.
